ideation: This animation sequence depicts a ninja's stealthy movements.  The first frame shows both arms held close to the body, ready for action.  The second frame shows a swift movement where one arm extends forward, possibly to strike, while the other remains close. The third frame depicts a defensive posture where both arms are raised slightly, guarding the face.  The final frame shows the ninja returning to a neutral position, arms at their sides.  The use of both arms and their alternating movements will add a sense of dynamism and realism to the animation.

frames.beat: ninja arms held low, ready to strike
left arm sweeps forward, right arm stays guarded
both arms rise to defend the face
ninja settles back to a neutral stance
